name: Hodogaya Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Hodogaya Chemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells functional colorants, specialty polymers, basic chemicals, and agro-science products in Japan. Its Functional Colorants segment offers OLED materials that are used in smartphone display panels; imaging materials for copiers and laser printers to function, helping to enhance precision in the office automation environment; dyes and colors for aluminum colorings, stationery inks, and hair dyes; and food additives used in making food more look appetizing by adding color to food products. The company's Specialty Polymers segment consists of polymer materials and construction materials businesses, as well as specialty chemicals, such as intermediates and additives for use in pharmaceuticals and cosmetics. Its primary products are PTG, an ingredient of spandex; urethane is used in a wide range of fields, including clothing, automotive parts, and leisure products. This segment's urethane coating waterproof materials are used to waterproof the roofs of office buildings, schools, and multi-story parking buildings for large-scale retail facilities. Its Basic Chemicals segment engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of hydrogen peroxide and its derivatives. The company's Agro-Science segment offers herbicides for use in lawn, weeding of rail lines and mega solar sites. Its Logistic segment provides logistics solutions, such as outdoor and hazardous materials warehousing and forwarding and customs clearance. The company was formerly known as Hodogaya Soda Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hodogaya Chemical Co., Ltd. in 1939. Hodogaya Chemical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1916 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
